name: Euphony 3
comment:
EUPHONY 3 is the new compact LED wash light featuring 7 Full Color LEDs, a wide zoom (5.6°- 69°) and high- efficiency optical system.
EUPHONY 3 is the extremely versatile moving head suitable for uniform projections on surfaces, from wide Wash to PC Beam. Furthermore thanks to its perfect color mixing, 16 gel filter emulations and the Hi-Q Dimming technology it can provide high standard performances.
